title: More Nonsense Limerick 37
content:
There was an old person of Dean
    Who dined on one pea, and one bean;
    For he said, "More than that, 
    Would make me too fat,"
    That cautious old person of Dean.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 37"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
